name: axion-designer
description: Give Codex repository-aware UI intelligence, authorized reference-to-code reconstruction, real-pixel review, mechanical proof, and durable design memory.

interface.shortDescription: Art-direct, reconstruct, inspect, and prove production Web UI.
interface.longDescription: A project-scoped Codex design layer that combines explicit-invocation art direction, offline design intelligence, authorized reference-to-code reconstruction, repository-native implementation, bounded source-backed context, real-pixel visual review, Studio comparison, fail-closed App Proof, semantic Taste Lock, MCP, and hash-chained cross-tool evidence.
capabilities: Nine-domain offline design intelligence with stack-aware direction recipes
Authorized reference-to-code evidence chain with anti-cheat validation
Studio Live Inspector and System Graph
Studio Reference overlay, scoped repair requests, Live Inspector, and System Graph
Hash-chained approvals, CI reports, and drift benchmark
Axion Bridge evidence federation for Storybook, Figma, previews, GitHub, Chromatic, artifacts, and webhooks
Official MCP server for bounded agent interoperability
Project-scoped explicit activation in Codex CLI and desktop
defaultPrompt: Use $dk-design to create or refine this interface in the real repository, inspect mobile and desktop pixels, and prove the result.
Use $dk-design in Explore lane to compare three structurally distinct directions before implementing and proving the strongest one.
Use $dk-design in Reconstruct lane to register these authorized references, map them onto the existing stack, implement real components, compare rendered pixels, and repair the top scoped deltas.
Use $dk-design in Verify lane to diagnose this frontend and fix deterministic findings without weakening policy or refreshing locks.
